step1.title: Validation
step1.invalidDescription: The link you used is invalid or has expired. Please contact your therapist.

step2.title: Consent
step2.consentRequired: I agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
step2.ageConfirm: I am of legal age or have informed a guardian

step3.title: Basic Information
step3.participantIdHint: Please note this number. Your therapist can use it to find your case.
step3.privacyNote: Your information is stored anonymously and used exclusively for ICF documentation.

step6.title: Therapy Goals
step6.minRequired: Please provide at least one goal.

step7.title: Aid Wishes
step7.intro: Describe in your own words what you are missing in everyday life or what would help you.
step7.missing: What are you missing in everyday life?
step7.missingPlaceholder: e.g. I can no longer climb stairs on my own...
step7.have: Which aids do you already use?
step7.havePlaceholder: e.g. I already use a walking stick...
step7.wantPlaceholder: e.g. A bathtub lift would help me a lot...

step8.title: Summary
step8.reviewInfo: Please review your information before submitting.

step9.title: Signature
step9.instruction: Please sign in the field below (with mouse or finger).
step9.required: A signature is required to submit.

step10.title: Thank You!
step10.noteHint: Please note these numbers. Your therapist can use them to find your documents.
step10.message: Thank you. Your contact person will get in touch.
